headline: Assessing Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Assessing Kimberly-Clark after recent share price weakness Kimberly-Clark (KMB) has drawn investor attention after a recent share price pullback, with the stock down about 10% over the past month and roughly 2% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Kimberly-Clark. Zooming out, Kimberly-Clark's recent 10% one month share price decline sits within a softer trend. The year to date share price return is slightly negative and the 1 year total shareholder return is down 25.66%,...
